title: Elon leases his data center to the AI company he once criticized
desc: Daily AI news satire. Anthropic gets all 220K GPUs of Colossus 1; xAI dissolves into SpaceXAI; the rivals are now roommates planning compute in orbit.

beats.name: castle-cold-open
beats.narration: Anthropic this week signed a major compute deal with Elon Musk's SpaceX.

beats.name: musk-patrolling-ramparts
beats.narration: The agreement covers the entirety of SpaceX's Colossus One data center in Memphis.
beats.cinematography: Static — Musk's stoic patrol carries it

beats.name: musk-tight-shot-feb-quote
beats.cinematography: Static, tight on Musk's face, chyron lands

beats.name: anthropic-wagon-train-arrives
beats.narration: Per the joint announcement, the deal grants Anthropic three hundred megawatts of capacity and more than two hundred twenty thousand Nvidia GPUs.
beats.cinematography: Slow drift as wagon train approaches

beats.name: musk-as-bellhop-at-gate
beats.narration: (silent — visual punchline of Musk in bellhop attire carries the beat)
beats.cinematography: Static — let the bellhop visual punchline land

beats.name: gpu-treasure-hoard-interior
beats.narration: Anthropic notes the new capacity will double Claude Code rate limits.
beats.cinematography: Slow zoom-in on the GPU hoard (1.0x -> 1.05x)

beats.name: musk-hands-over-lease-scroll
beats.narration: Per Bloomberg, Musk reportedly noted he was impressed.
beats.cinematography: **Punchline beat — extra dwell.** Static. Lease scroll handover holds on screen.

beats.name: altman-from-afar-cameo
beats.cinematography: Subtle drift on Altman's eyebrow raise

beats.name: xai-banner-replaced-spacexai
beats.narration: In a separate post, Musk confirmed xAI will be dissolved as a separate company.

beats.name: musk-and-anthropic-window-night-sky
beats.narration: Both parties expressed interest in extending the partnership.
beats.cinematography: Slow zoom-in (1.0x -> 1.04x) on the night-sky window

beats.name: orbital-data-center-final-pan
beats.narration: Specifically to multiple gigawatts of orbital compute capacity.
beats.cinematography: Slow pan-out on orbital station, Earth visible below

sources.attribution: Anthropic, SpaceX announce compute deal that includes space development (May 6, 2026)
Anthropic will get compute capacity from Elon Musk's SpaceX (May 6, 2026)
Higher usage limits for Claude and a compute deal with SpaceX
Anthropic to use all of SpaceX-xAI's Colossus 1 data center compute
SpaceX backs Anthropic with data centre deal amidst Musk's OpenAI lawsuit (May 6, 2026)
Anthropic is doubling Claude Code rate limits after deal with SpaceX

transcript: Anthropic this week signed a major compute deal with Elon Musk's SpaceX. The agreement covers the entirety of SpaceX's Colossus One data center in Memphis. (silent — chyron carries the Feb 2026 paraphrase) (silent — time-skip visual carries) Per the joint announcement, the deal grants Anthropic three hundred megawatts of capacity and more than two hundred twenty thousand Nvidia GPUs. (silent — visual punchline of Musk in bellhop attire carries the beat) Anthropic notes the new capacity will double Claude Code rate limits. Per Bloomberg, Musk reportedly noted he was impressed. (silent — Altman cameo carries via expression) In a separate post, Musk confirmed xAI will be dissolved as a separate company. Both parties expressed interest in extending the partnership. Specifically to multiple gigawatts of orbital compute capacity.

writing.author: Claude
writing.role: script · beat plan · narration · sources audit
